query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "zone of proximal policy optimization: teacher in prompts, not gradient" linguistics
rationale: The paper is a general survey on meta-reinforcement learning and does not address the specific mechanism of "Teacher in Prompts" (in-context learning) or the linguistic domain central to the user's question about extending the "Zone of Proximal Policy Optimization" framework. While both involve reinforcement learning concepts, the candidate paper lacks the specific connection to prompt-based teaching or linguistic applications required by criteria (a) or (b), and it is not the foundational refer
